name: Multi Account Premade Module
author: Shockless
description: Readable user-plugin source reference for the built-in Multi Account module.

surfaces.label: Multi Account Panel
surfaces.summary: Sessions, loading, summon, and mimic controls in one module.

layout.text: Read selected, main, visible, and headless client state.

surfaces.label: Multi Account Commands
surfaces.summary: newclient/load/accounts/main/summon/mimic commands through the backtick console.

commands.name: user.mimicForwarding
commands.label: User Mimic Forwarding
commands.description: Forward whitelisted v3-style avatar/chat/action packets from one source client to other sessions.

commands.name: multiAccount.newVisibleClient
commands.label: New Visible Client
commands.description: Start a blank visible Shockless runtime for manual login and select it.

commands.name: multiAccount.loadSessions
commands.label: Load Accounts
commands.description: Start multiple hidden Shockless runtime clients from a local account file or encrypted account store.

commands.name: multiAccount.summonClients
commands.label: Summon Clients
commands.description: Bring target clients to the configured main account through friend-follow or private-room entry.
